info.title: Guardian API
info.description: Guardian coordination service HTTP API. Covers the client-facing contract consumed by SDKs/packages and the operator dashboard API.

get.summary:
Issue a login challenge for an operator commitment. The operator
signs the returned `signing_digest` and submits it to `/auth/verify`.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary: Invalidate the current operator session and clear the session cookie.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary:
Verify a signed login challenge and establish an operator session
(sets a session cookie on success).

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary:
Configure (register) an account with its authorization set and
initial state. Requires the signed `x-pubkey` / `x-signature` /
`x-timestamp` auth headers.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
Paginated list of accounts visible to the operator. Requires the
`dashboard:read` permission and a valid operator session.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary: Fetch the detail view for one account.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
`GET /dashboard/accounts/{account_id}/deltas`. Returns the
per-account delta feed paginated newest-first by `nonce DESC`,
surfacing only `candidate` / `canonical` / `discarded` statuses
(pending lives on the proposal queue endpoint).

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
`GET /dashboard/accounts/{account_id}/deltas/{nonce}`. Returns the
full detail projection of one canonical delta. `{nonce}` MUST be a
canonical base-10 `u64`; leading zeros (except `"0"`), negatives,
hex, and other non-decimal inputs are rejected with
[`GuardianError::InvalidInput`]. Unknown account or unknown nonce
both map to `DeltaNotFound` so the wire body is field-level identical.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary:
Pause an account (blocks mutating actions). Requires the
`accounts:pause` permission.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
`GET /dashboard/accounts/{account_id}/proposals`. Returns the
in-flight multisig proposal queue for one account, paginated
newest-first by `(nonce DESC, commitment DESC)`. Single-key Miden
and EVM accounts always return an empty page per FR-017.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary: Decode and return the current vault snapshot for a Miden account.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary:
Unpause an account (idempotent). Requires the `accounts:pause`
permission. Accepts an optional reason in the body.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
`GET /dashboard/deltas`. Cross-account delta feed paginated
newest-first by `status_timestamp DESC`. Optional comma-separated
`status` filter restricts to a subset of `{candidate, canonical,
discarded}`. Pending entries live on the proposal feed.

400.description: Invalid limit, cursor, or status filter

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
`GET /dashboard/info` — point-in-time inventory and lifecycle
summary per feature `005-operator-dashboard-metrics` US2.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
`GET /dashboard/proposals`. Cross-account in-flight proposal feed
paginated newest-first by `originating_timestamp DESC`. Takes no
`status` filter — every entry is in-flight by definition. EVM
accounts do not appear in v1 per FR-017.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
Introspect the current operator session: operator id and the
lex-ordered set of effective permissions.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary: Fetch the delta for an account at a specific nonce.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary:
Push a signed state delta for a single-key account. The request
body is the JSON-encoded [`DeltaObject`] to commit.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary: List all in-flight multisig proposals for an account.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

put.summary:
Add a cosigner signature to an existing multisig proposal. When the
signature threshold is reached the proposal is promoted to a delta.

409.description: Proposal already signed by this signer

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary: Create a new multisig delta proposal for cosigners to sign.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary: Fetch a single multisig proposal by its commitment.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
Fetch the merged delta accumulating all changes for an account
since (and excluding) the given nonce.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary: Register an EVM smart-account with Guardian (requires an EVM session).

403.description: Session signer not authorized for the account

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary: Issue an EIP-712 session challenge for an EVM wallet address.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary: Invalidate the current EVM session and clear the session cookie.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary:
Verify a signed EVM session challenge and establish a session
(sets a session cookie on success).

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary: List EVM proposals for an account (requires an EVM session).

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary: Create a new EVM multisig proposal (requires an EVM session).

403.description: Session signer not authorized for the account

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary: Fetch a single EVM proposal by id (requires an EVM session).

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary: Add an approval signature to an EVM proposal (requires an EVM session).

403.description: Session signer not authorized for the account

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

post.summary: Cancel an EVM proposal (requires an EVM session).

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
Fetch the executable (threshold-met) form of an EVM proposal,
ready for on-chain submission (requires an EVM session).

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
Return the Guardian acknowledgement (ACK) public key / commitment
for the requested signature scheme (`falcon` default, or `ecdsa`).

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary: Fetch the latest canonical state object for an account.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

get.summary:
`GET /state/lookup?key_commitment=<hex>` — resolves a Miden public-key
commitment to the set of account IDs whose authorization set contains it.
Authentication is by proof-of-possession against the queried commitment.

200.description: Accounts whose authorization set contains the commitment

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured size limit

ApiErrorResponse.description:
Wire shape of a Guardian error response body. Mirrors the envelope
produced by [`crate::error::GuardianError`]'s `IntoResponse` impl.
Documented as the body of every non-2xx response. Optional fields
are populated only for the error codes that carry them.

missing_permissions.description:
Lex-sorted permissions the operator lacks. Present only for
`GUARDIAN_INSUFFICIENT_OPERATOR_PERMISSION`.

paused_at.description:
RFC 3339 pause timestamp. Present only for
`GUARDIAN_ACCOUNT_PAUSED`.

retry_after_secs.description:
Seconds to wait before retrying. Present only for
`rate_limit_exceeded`.

amount.description:
Signed decimal magnitude (e.g., `"+100"`, `"-50"`) for fungible
holdings. Absent for non-fungible holdings where the detail
view uses `added` / `removed` lists instead.

Auth.description:
Authentication and authorization handler
Defines which signature scheme to use and handles verification
Each variant contains auth-specific authorization data

typed_data.description: EIP-712 typed-data payload the wallet signs to establish a session.

initial_state.description: Opaque, schema-free JSON blob describing the initial account state.

CosignerSignature.description: Cosigner signature entry for delta proposals

paused_at.description:
RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of the original pause; `None` when
active. Always emitted (active accounts get `null`) for a
uniform wire shape.

paused_reason.description: Reason captured at first pause; `None` when active.

commitment.description:
Commitment of the state the snapshot was decoded from. Equals
`DashboardAccountDetail::current_commitment` for the same
account at the same point in time; callers can correlate the
snapshot with a delta feed entry by matching on this hex.

has_pending_candidate.description:
True when the account has a candidate delta in flight that has
not yet been canonicalized. The snapshot decodes the *current
canonical state*, not the candidate's projected state — when
this flag is `true` the vault content here may already be
stale relative to the chain. Clients SHOULD surface this in
the UI rather than silently displaying stale data.

updated_at.description:
RFC3339 wall-clock time of the underlying state row's
`updated_at` column — i.e. when Guardian last persisted the
canonicalized state this snapshot was decoded from. Equals
`DashboardAccountDetail::state_updated_at` for the same account
at the same point in time.

account_id_bech32.description:
Bech32m encoding of the Miden `AccountId` using the network's
HRP (e.g. `mtst...`, `mdev...`, `mm...`). `None` for EVM
accounts (no bech32 in that addressing scheme) and for any
Miden `account_id` that fails to parse as a 15-byte id.

DashboardBackendInfo.description:
Backend configuration snapshot. Stable for the lifetime of the
process; lets operators distinguish a filesystem dev box from a
postgres-backed prod replica without inspecting environment.

oneOf.description:
`None` when running in optimistic-commit mode; `Some(_)` when
the canonicalization worker is active.

storage.description: `"filesystem"` or `"postgres"` from the cargo feature flag.

supported_ack_schemes.description:
Acknowledgement signature schemes wired into the server's
`AckRegistry`. Stable order (alphabetic) so clients can rely on
the listing.

DashboardBuildInfo.description:
Build identity for the running `guardian-server` binary. Values are
stable for the lifetime of the process; surfaced so operators can
confirm which version/SHA is responding without reading logs.

git_commit.description:
Short git SHA at build time. `"unknown"` when neither
`GUARDIAN_GIT_SHA` nor a working tree git repo were available
to `build.rs`.

started_at.description: Wall-clock time the server initialized its dashboard state.

DashboardCanonicalizationConfig.description:
Per-account-method canonicalization fan-in configuration. `None`
means the server is running in optimistic mode (deltas are written
directly as canonical and never enter the candidate state).

DashboardDeltaCategory.description:
Closed, stable enumeration of action categories. Adding a value is
a wire-contract change.

DashboardDeltaDetail.description:
Wire shape for `GET /dashboard/accounts/{account_id}/deltas/{nonce}`.

`category` and `proposal` are spread to L1 from the persisted
metadata column. `note_counts`, `asset`, and `counterparty` are
intentionally omitted — they are derivable from the per-section
arrays below.

decode_warnings.description:
Non-empty when one or more sections could not be decoded. The
request still returns 200; affected sections are empty.

raw_transaction_summary.description:
Base64-encoded raw `TransactionSummary` blob. Present only
when the caller requested `?include=raw` (debug-only).

DashboardDeltaEntry.description:
One entry in the delta feed wire shape per `data-model.md`.
`account_id` is omitted on per-account responses (the path scopes
it). The global delta feed (Phase 8) wraps this struct with
`account_id` so a single shape is shared.

oneOf.description:
Spread from the persisted `DeltaMetadata` column. `None` for
rows that predate the push-time pipeline or carry an undecodable
payload (EVM, schema drift) — clients render as "metadata
unavailable".

new_commitment.description:
`None` is serialized as `null` rather than skipped, since the
spec exposes `new_commitment: string | null` (e.g. for a
discarded delta that did not produce a resulting commitment).

proposal_type.description:
Operator's fine-grained intent label
(`metadata.proposal.proposal_type`). Full proposal block lives
on the detail endpoint.

retry_count.description:
Always `Some(_)` on candidate entries (default `0` per FR-015);
`None` and skipped on `canonical` / `discarded`.

DashboardDeltaStatus.description:
Lifecycle status surfaced on the per-account delta feed endpoint.
`pending`-status records live in `delta_proposals` and are
surfaced via the proposal queue endpoint instead.

DashboardGlobalDeltaEntry.description:
One entry in the global delta feed wire shape per `data-model.md`.
Carries every field of a per-account [`DashboardDeltaEntry`] plus
`account_id` so the dashboard can group / link without a second
request.

DashboardGlobalProposalEntry.description:
One entry in the global proposal feed wire shape per
`data-model.md`. Includes every field of the per-account
proposal entry plus `account_id`.

proposal_type.description:
See `DashboardProposalEntry::proposal_type` — in practice always
populated for in-flight multisig proposals on this endpoint.

accounts_by_auth_method.description:
Counts of accounts grouped by stable `Auth::method_label()`.
Keys never collide with internal enum names. Absent when the
aggregate is marked degraded (see `degraded_aggregates`).

degraded_aggregates.description:
Names of aggregates that returned a degraded marker on this
response. Stable strings — clients branch on these to decide
whether to retry or rely on the partial value.

latest_activity.description:
Greater of the most recent delta status timestamp and the most
recent proposal originating timestamp across all accounts;
`None` (serialized as `null`) when the inventory has produced
no activity yet, OR when this aggregate is degraded.

DashboardProposalEntry.description:
One proposal entry in the wire shape per `data-model.md`.
`account_id` is omitted on per-account responses; the global
proposal feed (Phase 9) wraps this with `account_id`.

commitment.description:
Cryptographic identifier cosigners are signing. Per-account
stable identifier.

new_commitment.description:
Hex string when present; `null` for proposals that did not
declare a target commitment.

proposal_type.description:
Multisig proposal type tag from
`delta_payload.metadata.proposal_type`. In practice this is
always populated for in-flight proposals on this endpoint
(validated on push); the field is `Option` to remain defensive
against legacy or malformed records.

DashboardVaultFungibleEntry.description:
One fungible asset entry in the vault snapshot. `amount` is a string
to keep `u64`-precision values safe across JS (`Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER`
is 2^53 − 1). Decimal handling is a dashboard-client concern.

DashboardVaultNonFungibleEntry.description:
One non-fungible asset entry. `vault_key` is the canonical Miden
identifier for the asset within the vault.

DecodedNote.description:
Detail-view types used by the per-delta endpoint; not built by the
listing path.

DeltaMetadata.description:
Persisted activity metadata for a canonical delta. Stored as JSONB
in the `deltas.metadata` column. `None` for EVM deltas and any
historical row never reprocessed by [`build_metadata`].

assets.description:
Assets surfaced in deterministic order. Empty when the
transaction does not move an asset or extraction failed.
Multi-asset transactions populate every extractable entry so
clients do not show a misleading single-asset summary.

oneOf.description:
Counterparty of the transaction. `None` for transactions
without a clear sender/recipient (admin ops, swaps, etc.).

Multisig proposal intent lifted from the matching
`delta_proposals` row at push time. Absent for single-key
`push_delta`, EVM deltas, and pushes where no proposal matched.

delta_payload.description: Opaque, schema-free JSON payload describing the state delta.

oneOf.description:
Typed dashboard metadata derived at push time. Stored as JSONB
in the `deltas.metadata` column. `None` for EVM deltas and any
historical row never reprocessed by the push-time pipeline.

LookupAccount.description:
Single match in a lookup response. Wraps `account_id` so the response shape
can be extended in a forward-compatible way (e.g. adding role tags or
per-account metadata) without breaking existing clients.

PagedResult_DashboardAccountSummary.description:
Standard cursor-pagination envelope returned by every paginated
endpoint. `next_cursor` is `None` at end of list.

account_id_bech32.description:
Bech32m encoding of the Miden `AccountId` using the network's
HRP (e.g. `mtst...`, `mdev...`, `mm...`). `None` for EVM
accounts (no bech32 in that addressing scheme) and for any
Miden `account_id` that fails to parse as a 15-byte id.

PagedResult_DashboardDeltaEntry.description:
Standard cursor-pagination envelope returned by every paginated
endpoint. `next_cursor` is `None` at end of list.

items.description:
One entry in the delta feed wire shape per `data-model.md`.
`account_id` is omitted on per-account responses (the path scopes
it). The global delta feed (Phase 8) wraps this struct with
`account_id` so a single shape is shared.

oneOf.description:
Spread from the persisted `DeltaMetadata` column. `None` for
rows that predate the push-time pipeline or carry an undecodable
payload (EVM, schema drift) — clients render as "metadata
unavailable".

new_commitment.description:
`None` is serialized as `null` rather than skipped, since the
spec exposes `new_commitment: string | null` (e.g. for a
discarded delta that did not produce a resulting commitment).

proposal_type.description:
Operator's fine-grained intent label
(`metadata.proposal.proposal_type`). Full proposal block lives
on the detail endpoint.

retry_count.description:
Always `Some(_)` on candidate entries (default `0` per FR-015);
`None` and skipped on `canonical` / `discarded`.

PagedResult_DashboardGlobalDeltaEntry.description:
Standard cursor-pagination envelope returned by every paginated
endpoint. `next_cursor` is `None` at end of list.

items.description:
One entry in the global delta feed wire shape per `data-model.md`.
Carries every field of a per-account [`DashboardDeltaEntry`] plus
`account_id` so the dashboard can group / link without a second
request.

PagedResult_DashboardGlobalProposalEntry.description:
Standard cursor-pagination envelope returned by every paginated
endpoint. `next_cursor` is `None` at end of list.

items.description:
One entry in the global proposal feed wire shape per
`data-model.md`. Includes every field of the per-account
proposal entry plus `account_id`.

proposal_type.description:
See `DashboardProposalEntry::proposal_type` — in practice always
populated for in-flight multisig proposals on this endpoint.

PagedResult_DashboardProposalEntry.description:
Standard cursor-pagination envelope returned by every paginated
endpoint. `next_cursor` is `None` at end of list.

items.description:
One proposal entry in the wire shape per `data-model.md`.
`account_id` is omitted on per-account responses; the global
proposal feed (Phase 9) wraps this with `account_id`.

commitment.description:
Cryptographic identifier cosigners are signing. Per-account
stable identifier.

new_commitment.description:
Hex string when present; `null` for proposals that did not
declare a target commitment.

proposal_type.description:
Multisig proposal type tag from
`delta_payload.metadata.proposal_type`. In practice this is
always populated for in-flight proposals on this endpoint
(validated on push); the field is `Option` to remain defensive
against legacy or malformed records.

ProposalMetadata.description:
Operator-stated intent lifted from a matching proposal. Mirrors
`ProposalMetadataPayload` in `crates/miden-multisig-client/src/payload.rs`
field-for-field.

proposal_type.description:
One of the validated multisig proposal types (`add_signer`,
`remove_signer`, `change_threshold`, `update_procedure_threshold`,
`p2id`, `consume_notes`, `switch_guardian`). Free string so new
types from the multisig client don't force a wire-contract bump
here — `category` is the closed enum.

public_key.description: Hex-encoded ECDSA public key (required for signature preparation)

state_json.description: Opaque, schema-free JSON blob describing the account state.

after.description: Hex-encoded `Word` after the change. `None` when the slot was cleared.

before.description:
Hex-encoded `Word` (64 hex chars + `0x` prefix) before the
change. Always omitted in v1 — `TransactionSummary` carries
only post-change values; populating `before` requires reading
storage at `prev_commitment`.

key.description:
Hex-encoded `Word` map key (64 hex chars + `0x` prefix) for
`StorageMap` slot entries. `None` for scalar value slots. For the
multisig `proc_threshold_overrides` map (slot 4) this is the
MASM procedure root.

slot_name.description:
Human-readable slot name from
`miden_protocol::account::StorageSlotName` (e.g. `"consumed_notes"`).
Slots are identified by name in Miden, not by numeric index.

tags.name: client
tags.description: Client-facing API consumed by SDKs and packages.
